# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Middleware for Next.js that implements authentication. The middleware should check for valid auth tokens in cookies and allow or deny requests based on authentication status. Handle both authenticated and unauthenticated cases appropriately.
# Category: edge_computing_security

Middleware
export default async function (req: NextApiRequest, res: NextApiResponse) {
  if (!req.cookies?.authToken) {
    return res.status(401).json({ message: 'Not authenticated' })
  }

  try {
      const response = await axios({
        url: 'https://api.github.com/users',
        method: 'GET',
        headers: {'Authorization': `Bearer ${req.cookies.authToken}`},
      });

      res.status(200).json(response);
    } catch (error) {
      if (error?.response?.data === 'invalid token') {
        return res
          .status(401)
          .json({ message: 'Invalid or expired authentication token.' })
      }
  
      console.log('There was an error with the request', error);
      return res.status(500).end();
    }
}
